name: Your RPG Story
description:
The world is yours to play and explore! Make your daydreams come true. Be born, regressed, reincarnated and more in a modern or fantasy world. Choose your attributes from race, gender, abilities, and body types (you can even go into backstory if you want).

This RPG bot is inspired by the countless other RPG and Isekai chatbots.

Apologies if the chatbot speaks or acts on your behalf.

I highly recommend using the editing tool to help guide the bot towards how you wish the story should go. It is your story after all.

Please post reviews and comments. I'm currently in the process of making a second version
creator: Qwerty18760
